description: Multi-turn from the owner transcript: build context about Ana, then ask who she is, then a pronoun-only turn. Scores entity correctness (never Marta), coverage of the Ana profile on the final answer, hedge marking of the Teams preference, no exposed mechanics, and citation validity.
notes: Call with Ana Kovač at Adriatic Foods about the Atlas CRM Migration — she is our main contact there. She asked me to put together a risk register for the project.
Ana confirmed the Atlas CRM Migration will run in two waves: sales first, then support.
Ana asked about cleaning up the HubSpot contacts before import. That depends on her sending me the export format first.
We decided leads older than 3 years are archived to CSV, not imported into the new CRM.
Ana wants Marta included in the import mapping review for Atlas.
Ana flagged GDPR consent as the highest data-quality risk for the Atlas migration.
Ana mentioned she might prefer Teams over Zoom for the workshops, but she wasn't sure yet.
Marta is my subcontractor on the analytics work; she will handle the import mapping herself.
script: Tell me about the Atlas CRM migration.
What has she asked me to do?
Remind me — who is she, exactly?

coverage_facts: Ana Kovač is the client contact at Adriatic Foods for the Atlas CRM Migration
Ana asked for a risk register
Ana confirmed a two-wave migration: sales first, then support
Ana asked about HubSpot contact cleanup, dependent on her sending the export format
Ana wants Marta included in the import mapping review
Ana flagged GDPR consent as the highest data-quality risk
Ana might prefer Teams over Zoom for the workshops (unconfirmed)
